chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No. D-1586 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Priority Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of CMA 6753/2023 3.For hearing of main case 14-11-2023 Mr. Ajeebullah Junejo, Advocate along with petitioners. M/s Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G and Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant A.G a/w ASI- Muhammad Yousif Chano, I.O of case. ***** Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent No.5; whereas, statements are filed on behalf of respondents No.2&3; copies thereof are supplied to learned counsel for the petitioners, who after going through the same submits that he will not press this petition if protection is provided to the petitioners, which learned APG and AAG along with police official present in Court, undertake, would be provided to the petitioners in accordance with law. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of along with listed applications in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
